title: Configure People column to only accept people or teams

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Allow a People column to be configured to only accept persons or teams, not both.

Right now a People column is universal. We can limit the number of people or teams, but not the kind.

There are many use cases where something needs to be assigned to just a person and never a team - or vice versa. Think project ownership, managers, account owners.

This just makes it easier to ensure the right selections are made.
